title: Smart Agriculture Market Size to Exceed USD 48.36 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The U.S. smart agriculture market is projected to grow from $19.34 billion in 2025 to $48.36 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 9.6%. Growth is driven by declining solar energy costs, increased adoption of digital agriculture solutions, and precision farming technologies. Software dominates with 56% market share, while precision farming leads applications at 42%. North America holds 36% market share, with Asia Pacific as the fastest-growing region.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Explicitly mentioned as a market leader setting standards in smart agriculture with state-of-the-art machinery and software solutions, positioned to benefit from the projected 9.6% CAGR market growth.

Highlighted as a major market leader and innovator, with recent product launches (GFX-1060 and GFX-1260 precision agriculture screens) demonstrating active market participation and technological advancement.
Listed among leading market players but no specific recent developments or market positioning details provided in the article.

title: Regenerative Agriculture Global Market Forecast Report 2026-2030: Strategic Alliances Between Startups and Agribusinesses Accelerate Scaling of Data-Driven Agricultural Technologies
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global regenerative agriculture market is projected to grow from USD 3.86 billion in 2025 to USD 6.17 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 9.78%. Growth is driven by stakeholder adoption, policy support, advanced agricultural technologies, and increasing demand for sustainable food systems. Strategic alliances between agritech startups and major agribusinesses are accelerating the development and scaling of data-driven and biological solutions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Featured as a key company in the regenerative agriculture market, positioned to benefit from the 9.78% CAGR growth and increasing adoption of sustainable farming technologies.
Listed among companies advancing eco agriculture, positioned to benefit from transparent, certified regenerative value chains and premium product segmentation.
Featured as a key company, likely to benefit from collaborative initiatives fostering certified regenerative value chains and consumer demand for sustainable products.
Listed among leading companies advancing eco agriculture, well-positioned to capitalize on growing demand for bio-based crop protection and biological nutrient inputs.

title: Farm Software Management Solution Market Size to Grow USD 5.37 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global Farm Software Management Solution market is valued at USD 2.41 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 5.37 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 8.37%. Growth is driven by government mandates, regulatory support including USDA digital agriculture requirements and EU Farm-to-Fork compliance, and increasing adoption of cloud-based farm management platforms. Cloud-based solutions dominate with 61.38% market share, while crop management applications lead with 32.56% revenue share. Asia Pacific is the fastest-growing region with 10.14% CAGR.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company expanded its Trimble Ag Software platform with AI-powered yield prediction and automated variable-rate application modules in March 2025, demonstrating active innovation and market leadership in farm management solutions.

John Deere launched an enhanced cloud-based Operations Center platform with real-time autonomous field scouting and AI-driven crop disease detection in January 2025, showing strong product development and market expansion efforts.
Identified as a leading market player but no specific recent developments or performance information disclosed in the article.
Listed as a leading market player through its Case IH and New Holland Agriculture brands, but no specific recent developments or performance metrics provided in the article.

title: Liquid Fertilizer Applicators Market Report 2026: $2.68 Bn Opportunities, Trends, Competitive Landscape, Strategies, and Forecasts, 2020-2025, 2025-2030F, 2035F
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global liquid fertilizer applicators market is projected to grow from $1.89 billion in 2025 to $2.68 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 7.2%. Growth is driven by mechanized farming adoption, precision application technologies, AI-based controls, and sustainable practices. North America leads the market while Asia-Pacific is the fastest-growing region.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a key player in the liquid fertilizer applicators market, positioned to benefit from the projected 7.2% CAGR growth through 2030 and increasing demand for precision application technologies.
Identified as a major player in the sector with opportunities to capitalize on growing adoption of mechanized farming and smart fertilizer delivery systems.
Featured as a competitor in the market positioned to benefit from industry trends including AI-based controls, sustainable practices, and increased agricultural productivity demands.

title: AGCO continues crackdown on illegal gaming machines: over 50 devices removed after province-wide sweep
author: Globe Newswire
description: The Alcohol and Gaming Commission of Ontario (AGCO) conducted over 200 inspections, removing more than 50 unlawful 'Prime Slots' gaming machines from bars, restaurants, and lottery retailers during a province-wide enforcement sweep in summer 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Proactively addressing unregulated gaming machines and protecting public safety through comprehensive regulatory actions
